min_entry_age.source_quote: Minimum Age: The minimum entry age is 91 days.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum Age: The maximum entry age is 65 years.

max_renewal_age.source_quote: There is no maximum cover ceasing age in this Policy. (Life-long Renewal)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Base Sum Insured 5 & 7.5 Lacs 10 Lacs 15 Lacs 20, 25, 50 & 100 & 200

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first Policy

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity: Code – Excl18 (Maternity not covered in base; available only via optional 'Parenthood' add-on)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Such expenses shall be indemnified if the same were incurred upto 60 days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 180 days unless otherwise specified in the Policy Schedule, immediately post the date of discharge

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment covered (all listed day-care procedures included; no fixed count in wording)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.4. AYUSH Treatment ... in any AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity: Code – Excl18 (excluded in base; Parenthood add-on optional)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Newborn baby cover available only under Parenthood add-on, not in base

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.7. Organ Donor Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses ... towards the organ donor's Hospitalization for harvesting

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Modification of Cumulative bonus from 10% of Base Sum Insured upto 100% ... to 25% of Base Sum Insured upto 100% (base CB: 50% on renewal, max 100%)

restoration_benefit.value: Automatic Restore Benefit: 100% of Base Sum Insured, once per policy year
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 2.6. Automatic Restore Benefit ... Automatic Restore Equal to 100% of Base sum

room_rent_capping.value: No room rent capping (any room category)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: No room rent capping is a feature of HDFC ERGO Optima series (per product brochure summary)

copayment_pct.source_quote: No co-payment shall apply if Insured Person from Tier 2 avails a treatment in Tier 1. (No base copay; optional zone-based copay only)

deductible_amount.source_quote: Aggregate Deductible refers to a cost-sharing agreement ... Insured agrees to bear a self-opted amount (optional, not base)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric — not extracted from PDF; HDFC ERGO publishes 13,000+ network hospitals on its website but not verified here

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured ...

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted in this curation pass

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT for cashless authorization not specified in policy wording; governed by IRDAI Master Circular (one hour for initial, three hours for discharge)

policy_type.source_quote: Sum Insured means the aggregate limit of indemnity ... (indemnity-based health insurance)

_meta.notes: Parsed via pdfplumber from local policy wording. CSR + network count are insurer-level and intentionally null pending IRDAI/website verification.
